title: BA14 9AX, Wessex Water Enterprises Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/HB3602TR/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Wessex Water Enterprises Limited   Installation name: Trowbridge Bioresources Centre   Permit number: EPR/HB3602TR/V003   "
